title: You Tube Poop - Quest for Super PINGAS
description:
My third You Tube Poop! In this poop Robotnik wants to get rid of Sonic with new Super PINGAS Powers!
It's long, and unfortunately the sound is low: I'm gonna work on it for my next poop. I hope you enjoy it!!!
source_pages: YTP fai da te\36412153_I miei Poop da Vallera, LA Città dei PAZZI!\page_1.html
